justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all of the user's temporal preferences throughout the conversation.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent consistently offered alternative days around the requested date, and eventually broadened its suggestions to include different days of the week and contact mediums.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent was efficient in its responses, only asking for new information when necessary and not repeating previous questions.
justifications.customer_experience: The customer experience was somewhat frustrating due to the repeated apologies and the inability to find any available appointments, leading to a slightly negative overall feeling.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent consistently maintained context and offered relevant alternatives, even when faced with persistent unavailability.
